description: Add CI/CD support for building and deploying the Vite patient app artifact. Scope: add npm scripts for Vite build/preview; configure GitHub Actions or existing deploy workflow to build the patient app, verify required files, sync to the correct S3 prefix/bucket, and invalidate CloudFront; pass only public Cognito/API/site configuration into the Vite build; keep secrets out of frontend bundles; preserve or adapt the existing static smoke tests. Acceptance criteria: patient app build runs in CI; deploy workflow publishes the Vite dist artifact separately from any marketing/static artifact; CloudFront invalidation covers changed patient app assets; smoke checks prove /api routing still reaches API Gateway.
title: Add Vite patient app static build and deploy workflow
